ogTitle: Paddys River vs Padstow Heights: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Paddys River and Padstow Heights.
heading: Paddys River vs Padstow Heights — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Paddys River, New South Wales and Padstow Heights, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Paddys River has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Padstow Heights (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Paddys River or Padstow Heights safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Paddys River has a flood risk score of 55/100, while Padstow Heights scores 41/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Paddys River scores 19/100 for bushfire risk. Padstow Heights scores 45/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Paddys River or Padstow Heights?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Paddys River has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.03% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
